name: The Brightvale Watch
description: The town's guard company — gate duty, market patrols, and the keeping of the peace.
agenda: Captain Hedra quietly suspects someone on the town council is paying the road bandits to keep caravan tolls high, and wants proof before she accuses anyone.

name: The Gray Hand
description: A smugglers' brotherhood said to move goods past the toll gates by night.
agenda: Buy the old mill for a pittance, dig out the flooded undercroft, and run contraband beneath the town wall itself. The wolves denning there are a convenient deterrent.
